summary: Fixed archive origin fidelity, snapshot-only visited routing, read-only archive source attaches, atomic FTS rebuilds, and archive-mode output tests.
reason: Peer-gate findings identified silent wrong archive semantics for origin/referrers and insufficient output-level coverage before the unreleased archive feature ships.
validated_outcome: GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./internal/..., and gofmt -l on changed Go files all passed.
